en.title: Best Collagen Powder 2026: Vital Proteins, Nutricost, Transparent Labs Tested and Ranked
en.description: The collagen peptide powders worth buying in 2026, ranked on sourcing, third-party testing, dosage, mixability, and cost per serving.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳膠原蛋白粉排行榜：Vital Proteins、Nutricost、Transparent Labs 實測推薦
zh-tw.description: 2026 年值得買的膠原蛋白胜肽粉，從來源、第三方檢驗、劑量、溶解度到每份成本完整排名。

en.description: 20 g of grass-fed, pasture-raised type I and III bovine collagen per serving with the smoothest mixability I have tested, backed by independent Swift lab testing and a cGMP facility.

zh-tw.description: 每份 20 克草飼放牧牛的第一與第三型膠原蛋白，溶解度是我實測過最滑順的，通過獨立 Swift 實驗室檢驗，在 cGMP 廠房生產。

en.description: 22 g of hydrolyzed grass-fed bovine collagen per serving, the highest dose here, with Informed Sport and Informed Choice certifications and a fully disclosed label.

zh-tw.description: 每份 22 克水解草飼牛膠原蛋白，是這份榜單裡劑量最高的，通過 Informed Sport 與 Informed Choice 認證，成分表完全透明。

en.description: 11 g of grass-fed bovine collagen per scoop, unflavored and additive-free, with third-party testing at one of the lowest costs per serving on the market.

zh-tw.description: 每匙 11 克草飼牛膠原蛋白，無味無添加，通過第三方檢驗，每份成本是市場上最低的其中之一。

en.description: 20 g of hydrolyzed collagen from ten sources covering types I, II, III, V and X, plus SBO probiotics and vitamin C for the widest type coverage here.

zh-tw.description: 每份 20 克水解膠原蛋白，來自十種來源涵蓋第一、二、三、五、十型，另加土壤益生菌與維他命 C，是這份榜單型別覆蓋最全的。

en.description: 13 g of grass-fed collagen paired with nicotinamide riboside and a patented black currant polyphenol blend, formulated for skin texture and moisture with clinically studied ingredients.

zh-tw.description: 每份 13 克草飼膠原蛋白，搭配菸鹼醯胺核糖與專利黑醋栗多酚配方，針對膚質與保濕設計，用的是有臨床研究的成分。

en.description: 11 g of type I and III hydrolyzed bovine collagen per scoop with an Informed Choice certification, a very mild taste, and fast cold-water dissolution.

zh-tw.description: 每匙 11 克第一與第三型水解牛膠原蛋白，通過 Informed Choice 認證，味道很淡，冷水也能快速溶解。

en.description: Pasture-raised collagen with added vitamin C, zinc and copper to support synthesis, carrying NSF Certified for Sport testing against over 270 banned substances.

zh-tw.description: 放牧牛膠原蛋白額外加了維他命 C、鋅與銅來支持合成，通過 NSF Certified for Sport 針對超過 270 種禁用物質的檢驗。

en.description: Hydrolyzed marine collagen with hyaluronic acid and vitamin C, ISO-verified lab reports, and low molecular weight peptides for absorption at a budget price.

zh-tw.description: 水解海洋膠原蛋白加了玻尿酸與維他命 C，附 ISO 認證實驗室報告，低分子量胜肽好吸收，價格親民。

en.description: Grass-fed bovine collagen tested for purity and designed for prenatal and postpartum needs, with practitioner-grade sourcing and full batch transparency.

zh-tw.description: 草飼牛膠原蛋白，檢驗純度，專為孕期與產後需求設計，用的是臨床等級來源，逐批資訊完全透明。

en.description: Multi-source collagen covering types I, II, III, V and X with biotin, hyaluronic acid and vitamin C at 82 servings per tub, the cheapest cost per serving here.

zh-tw.description: 多來源膠原蛋白涵蓋第一、二、三、五、十型，加了生物素、玻尿酸與維他命 C，一桶 82 份，每份成本是這裡最低的。

references.title: 9 Best Collagen Powders of 2026 (Tested and Reviewed)

en.commentary: Collagen powder is the single product driving the whole beauty-from-within category right now, and after working through the field I keep landing on the same answer: Vital Proteins Collagen Peptides is the one to beat. The 20 g serving of grass-fed type I and III collagen dissolves cleaner than anything else I stirred into cold water, and that mixability matters because the powder you actually finish is the powder that works. It carries independent Swift lab testing and cGMP production, so the quality holds up to the price. Transparent Labs takes second on raw substance. At 22 g per serving it is the highest dose here, and the Informed Sport certification plus a single-ingredient unflavored option makes it my pick for anyone who wants maximum collagen with a label they can read top to bottom. Nutricost earns third purely on value. You get grass-fed collagen and third-party testing at a cost per serving the premium brands cannot touch, and for a daily consumable that math compounds fast. Where you land below the top three depends on what you want the collagen to do. Thorne Collagen Plus builds in nicotinamide riboside and black currant polyphenols for skin, Gnarly Collagen Pro is the athlete's choice with NSF Certified for Sport screening against 270-plus banned substances, and CollagenUP is the marine and budget option with hyaluronic acid built in. Every product here is worth buying. The ranking reflects which one I would reach for first.

highlights.title: Vital Proteins wins on the thing you use daily: mixability
highlights.body: A collagen powder only works if you keep taking it, and Vital Proteins dissolves into cold water with no grit or clumping, which is the difference between a tub you finish and one that sits in the cupboard. Pair that texture with 20 g of grass-fed type I and III collagen, independent Swift lab testing, and cGMP production, and it earns the top spot on the fundamentals rather than marketing.

highlights.title: Transparent Labs is the highest dose with a label you can fully read
highlights.body: At 22 g of hydrolyzed grass-fed collagen per serving it delivers the most protein per scoop in this field, and the unflavored version lists exactly one ingredient. Add Informed Sport and Informed Choice certifications and it becomes the clear choice for anyone who wants maximum collagen without a proprietary blend hiding the details.

highlights.title: Nutricost proves you do not need to overpay for grass-fed collagen
highlights.body: Grass-fed bovine collagen, third-party testing, and no additives at one of the lowest costs per serving on the market. For a supplement you take every single day, the price gap between Nutricost and the premium tier compounds over months, and the quality floor is high enough that I recommend it without hesitation to anyone starting out.

highlights.title: Buy for the outcome you want, not just the brand
highlights.body: Thorne Collagen Plus adds nicotinamide riboside and black currant polyphenols for skin texture and moisture, Gnarly Collagen Pro carries NSF Certified for Sport screening for competitive athletes, and CollagenUP uses marine collagen with hyaluronic acid at a budget price. The best tub for you is the one built around your actual goal, whether that is skin, sport, or cost.

zh-tw.commentary: 膠原蛋白粉現在是驅動整個美容內服類目成長最猛的單品，我把市面上主流的幾款都試過一輪，結論很明確，Vital Proteins Collagen Peptides 就是那個要被超越的標竿。每份 20 克草飼第一與第三型膠原蛋白，倒進冷水裡溶得比我試過的任何一款都乾淨，這點很重要，因為你真的會喝完的那罐才是有效的那罐。它有獨立 Swift 實驗室檢驗加 cGMP 廠房生產，品質撐得起這個價位。Transparent Labs 拿下第二，靠的是實打實的份量。每份 22 克是這份榜單裡劑量最高的，加上 Informed Sport 認證跟單一成分無味版本，對想要膠原含量拉到最高、成分表又能從頭讀到尾的人來說，這款就是我的首選。Nutricost 排第三純粹靠性價比。草飼膠原加第三方檢驗，每份成本卻是高階品牌追不上的，對一款每天都要喝的耗材來說，這筆帳長期下來差很大。第三名以下要看你想讓膠原蛋白做什麼。Thorne Collagen Plus 加了菸鹼醯胺核糖跟黑醋栗多酚顧膚質，Gnarly Collagen Pro 是運動員首選，通過 NSF Certified for Sport 針對 270 多種禁用物質的篩檢，CollagenUP 則是海洋膠原加玻尿酸的平價選擇。老實說這份榜單上每一款都值得買，排名只是反映我會先伸手拿哪一罐。

highlights.title: Vital Proteins 贏在你每天都會用到的那件事：好溶解
highlights.body: 膠原蛋白粉要有效，前提是你得持續喝下去，而 Vital Proteins 倒進冷水就化開，沒有顆粒感也不結塊，這就是一罐會被你喝完跟一罐擺在櫃子裡積灰的差別。這個口感再配上每份 20 克草飼第一與第三型膠原蛋白、獨立 Swift 實驗室檢驗跟 cGMP 生產，它是靠基本功坐上第一，不是靠行銷。

highlights.title: Transparent Labs 是劑量最高、成分表又能完全讀懂的那款
highlights.body: 每份 22 克水解草飼膠原蛋白，是這份榜單裡每匙蛋白質最多的，而且無味版成分表就只列一項東西。再加上 Informed Sport 與 Informed Choice 認證，對想要膠原含量最大化、又不想被複方配方藏細節的人來說，這款是明確的選擇。

highlights.title: Nutricost 證明買草飼膠原不用花冤枉錢
highlights.body: 草飼牛膠原、第三方檢驗、零添加，每份成本卻是市場上最低的其中之一。對一款每天都要喝的補給品來說，Nutricost 跟高階價位帶之間的價差，幾個月下來會滾出可觀的差距，而它的品質底線夠高，我會毫不猶豫推薦給剛開始吃膠原的人。

highlights.title: 照你的目標挑，別只看品牌
highlights.body: Thorne Collagen Plus 加了菸鹼醯胺核糖跟黑醋栗多酚顧膚質保濕，Gnarly Collagen Pro 通過 NSF Certified for Sport 篩檢適合競技運動員，CollagenUP 用海洋膠原加玻尿酸走平價路線。最適合你的那一罐，是圍繞你真正的目標打造的那罐，看你要顧皮膚、拚運動，還是省荷包。
